title: ConvertKit vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs MailerLite: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and MailerLite comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while MailerLite targets small businesses and freelancers on a budget. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while MailerLite is stronger for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $29/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching from MailerLite to ConvertKit is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
